name: should use from-table optimization with 7 columns from multiple sources
description: Tests from-table optimization with scoring format seasonlogs as FROM table, joining league format seasonlogs, weighted opportunity CTE, and player seasonlogs. Verifies scoring_format_id and year conditions appear in WHERE clause.
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "pg"."pid") select "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."points" AS "points_from_seasonlogs_0", "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."points_rnk" AS "points_rnk_from_seasonlogs_0", "tbc362e3039a963f16b3dcc91b8ff1f18"."points_added_earned" AS "points_added_earned_from_seasonlogs_0", "tbc362e3039a963f16b3dcc91b8ff1f18"."points_added_earned_per_game" AS "points_added_earned_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_0", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_overall_score" AS "espn_overall_score_0", "player"."primary_position" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."pid" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "league_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tbc362e3039a963f16b3dcc91b8ff1f18" on "tbc362e3039a963f16b3dcc91b8ff1f18"."pid" = "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."pid" and "tbc362e3039a963f16b3dcc91b8ff1f18"."year" = "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."year" and "tbc362e3039a963f16b3dcc91b8ff1f18"."league_format_id" = 'genesis_10_team' left join "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819" on "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819"."pid" = "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."pid" left join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."pid" and "player_seasonlogs"."year" = "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."year" and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' where "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' and "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."year" = 2024 and player.primary_position IN ('RB', 'WR', 'TE') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."points", "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."points_per_game", "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."points_rnk", "tbc362e3039a963f16b3dcc91b8ff1f18"."points_added_earned", "tbc362e3039a963f16b3dcc91b8ff1f18"."points_added_earned_per_game", "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_overall_score", "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "t921b19c91c76ce24bc31e8948414f582"."pid" asc limit 500
